bull.thesis: Azure re-accelerates to 40%+ as AI capacity comes online. Copilot ARR reaches $30B+ by FY2028. CapEx peaks in FY2026 and FCF recovery begins, driving multiple expansion to 35x+ P/E.

base.thesis: Azure grows 24-27% through FY2028 but CapEx cycle extends through FY2028. FCF margins compressed to 20-22%. Operating margins stable at 47-49% but capital intensity reprices the stock to 25-28x P/E.

bear.thesis: AI CapEx ROI fails to materialize within 3 years. Azure decelerates to 15-20% on enterprise spending cuts and competitive pressure. OpenAI partnership disruption. Antitrust remedies restrict bundling. Multiple compresses to 20x P/E.

kelly_criterion.recommendation: NEGATIVE EXPECTED VALUE — do not take new position

breakeven.note: Negative breakeven means position is unprofitable even with 0% bear probability given base case is negative

conviction.rationale: DCF-comps divergence unresolved; negative Kelly; forensic quality 3.5/5; downtrend confirmed
